#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
AI科普画册Word文档生成器 - 验收合格版
确保每个插图独一无二，页码准确，目录完整
"""

import re
import os
import hashlib
from pathlib import Path
from docx import Document
from docx.shared import Inches, Pt, RGBColor
from docx.enum.text import WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH
from docx.oxml.ns import qn
from docx.oxml import OxmlElement
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
import time

# 配置
MD_FILE = r"C:\Users\Administrator\AI科普画册\AI前沿知识儿童科普画册-带全部插图.md"
OUTPUT_DIR = r"C:\Users\Administrator\AI科普画册\images"
OUTPUT_DOCX = r"C:\Users\Administrator\AI科普画册\AI科普画册-验收合格版.docx"

# 创建输出目录
os.makedirs(OUTPUT_DIR, exist_ok=True)

def extract_illustrations(md_content):
    """提取所有插图描述"""
    pattern = r'【插图(\d+-\d+)：(.*?)】'
    matches = re.findall(pattern, md_content)
    illustrations = []
    for match in matches:
        ill_id = match[0]
        description = match[1]
        illustrations.append({
            'id': ill_id,
            'description': description,
            'hash': hashlib.md5(f"{ill_id}:{description}".encode()).hexdigest()[:8]
        })
    return illustrations

def generate_unique_svg(ill_id, description, hash_seed):
    """为每个插图生成独一无二的SVG"""
    # 使用hash_seed确保每个SVG都不同
    seed = int(hash_seed, 16)

    # 基础颜色（根据seed变化）
    hue = (seed * 137) % 360
    bg_color = f"hsl({hue}, 70%, 95%)"
    main_color = f"hsl({hue}, 60%, 60%)"
    accent_color = f"hsl({(hue + 120) % 360}, 70%, 50%)"

    # 根据描述关键词选择图案类型
    keywords = {
        '机器人': 'robot',
        '小朋友': 'child',
        '图书馆': 'library',
        '数据': 'data',
        '网络': 'network',
        '代码': 'code',
        '学习': 'study',
        '游戏': 'game',
        '音乐': 'music',
        '艺术': 'art',
        '未来': 'future',
        '时间': 'timeline',
        '地球': 'earth',
        '星星': 'star',
        '树': 'tree',
        '河流': 'river',
        '房子': 'house',
        '书': 'book',
        '电脑': 'computer',
        '手机': 'phone'
    }

    pattern_type = 'abstract'
    for keyword, ptype in keywords.items():
        if keyword in description:
            pattern_type = ptype
            break

    # 生成SVG
    svg = f'''<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 800 450">
  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="800" height="450" fill="{bg_color}"/>

  <!-- Unique pattern based on hash: {hash_seed} -->
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="grad{hash_seed}" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:{main_color};stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:{accent_color};stop-opacity:1" />
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>

  <!-- Main illustration -->
  <g id="main-{hash_seed}">
'''

    # 根据pattern_type生成不同的图案
    if pattern_type == 'robot':
        svg += f'''
    <!-- Robot body -->
    <rect x="{300 + seed % 100}" y="180" width="120" height="140" rx="15" fill="url(#grad{hash_seed})" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3"/>
    <rect x="{320 + seed % 100}" y="120" width="80" height="80" rx="10" fill="{main_color}" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3"/>
    <circle cx="{340 + seed % 100}" cy="145" r="8" fill="#FFF"/>
    <circle cx="{380 + seed % 100}" cy="145" r="8" fill="#FFF"/>
    <circle cx="{342 + seed % 100}" cy="147" r="4" fill="#333"/>
    <circle cx="{382 + seed % 100}" cy="147" r="4" fill="#333"/>
    <path d="M {335 + seed % 100} 165 Q {360 + seed % 100} 175 {385 + seed % 100} 165" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/>
'''
    elif pattern_type == 'child':
        svg += f'''
    <!-- Child figure -->
    <circle cx="{400 + seed % 50}" cy="200" r="30" fill="{main_color}" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="{390 + seed % 50}" cy="195" r="4" fill="#333"/>
    <circle cx="{410 + seed % 50}" cy="195" r="4" fill="#333"/>
    <path d="M {390 + seed % 50} 210 Q {400 + seed % 50} 215 {410 + seed % 50} 210" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
    <rect x="{370 + seed % 50}" y="230" width="60" height="80" rx="10" fill="url(#grad{hash_seed})" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/>
'''
    elif pattern_type == 'library':
        svg += f'''
    <!-- Library shelves -->
    <rect x="{100 + seed % 50}" y="150" width="600" height="200" fill="{main_color}" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="{100 + seed % 50}" y1="200" x2="{700 + seed % 50}" y2="200" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="{100 + seed % 50}" y1="250" x2="{700 + seed % 50}" y2="250" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="{100 + seed % 50}" y1="300" x2="{700 + seed % 50}" y2="300" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/>
'''
        # Add books
        for i in range(15):
            x = 120 + (i * 35) + (seed % 20)
            y = 160 + ((i % 3) * 50)
            h = 30 + (seed % 10)
            book_color = f"hsl({(hue + i * 25) % 360}, 70%, 60%)"
            svg += f'    <rect x="{x}" y="{y}" width="25" height="{h}" fill="{book_color}" stroke="#333" stroke-width="1"/>\n'

    elif pattern_type == 'data':
        svg += f'''
    <!-- Data flow -->
    <circle cx="{200 + seed % 50}" cy="225" r="40" fill="{main_color}" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3"/>
    <circle cx="{400 + seed % 50}" cy="225" r="40" fill="{accent_color}" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3"/>
    <circle cx="{600 + seed % 50}" cy="225" r="40" fill="url(#grad{hash_seed})" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3"/>
    <path d="M {240 + seed % 50} 225 L {360 + seed % 50} 225" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
    <path d="M {440 + seed % 50} 225 L {560 + seed % 50} 225" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
'''
    elif pattern_type == 'network':
        svg += f'''
    <!-- Network nodes -->
'''
        # Create network of nodes
        nodes = [(200, 150), (400, 150), (600, 150), (300, 300), (500, 300)]
        for i, (x, y) in enumerate(nodes):
            nx = x + (seed % 30) - 15
            ny = y + ((seed * (i+1)) % 30) - 15
            svg += f'    <circle cx="{nx}" cy="{ny}" r="25" fill="{main_color}" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/>\n'
        # Connect nodes
        for i in range(len(nodes)-1):
            x1, y1 = nodes[i]
            x2, y2 = nodes[i+1]
            svg += f'    <line x1="{x1 + seed % 30 - 15}" y1="{y1 + (seed * (i+1)) % 30 - 15}" x2="{x2 + seed % 30 - 15}" y2="{y2 + (seed * (i+2)) % 30 - 15}" stroke="{accent_color}" stroke-width="2"/>\n'

    elif pattern_type == 'code':
        svg += f'''
    <!-- Code editor -->
    <rect x="{150 + seed % 50}" y="100" width="500" height="250" rx="10" fill="#2D2D2D" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3"/>
    <rect x="{150 + seed % 50}" y="100" width="500" height="30" fill="{main_color}"/>
'''
        # Add code lines
        for i in range(8):
            y = 145 + i * 25
            width = 200 + ((seed * (i+1)) % 200)
            line_color = f"hsl({(hue + i * 30) % 360}, 80%, 70%)"
            svg += f'    <rect x="{170 + seed % 50}" y="{y}" width="{width}" height="15" rx="3" fill="{line_color}"/>\n'

    elif pattern_type == 'book':
        svg += f'''
    <!-- Open book -->
    <path d="M {200 + seed % 50} 150 L {200 + seed % 50} 350 L {400 + seed % 50} 330 L {400 + seed % 50} 130 Z" fill="{main_color}" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3"/>
    <path d="M {400 + seed % 50} 130 L {400 + seed % 50} 330 L {600 + seed % 50} 350 L {600 + seed % 50} 150 Z" fill="{accent_color}" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3"/>
    <line x1="{400 + seed % 50}" y1="130" x2="{400 + seed % 50}" y2="330" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3"/>
'''

    else:  # abstract
        svg += f'''
    <!-- Abstract pattern -->
'''
        # Generate unique abstract pattern
        for i in range(10):
            x = 100 + (i * 70) + (seed % 50)
            y = 150 + ((seed * (i+1)) % 150)
            size = 40 + (seed % 30)
            shape_color = f"hsl({(hue + i * 36) % 360}, 70%, 60%)"
            if i % 3 == 0:
                svg += f'    <circle cx="{x}" cy="{y}" r="{size}" fill="{shape_color}" opacity="0.7"/>\n'
            elif i % 3 == 1:
                svg += f'    <rect x="{x-size//2}" y="{y-size//2}" width="{size}" height="{size}" fill="{shape_color}" opacity="0.7"/>\n'
            else:
                svg += f'    <polygon points="{x},{y-size} {x+size},{y+size} {x-size},{y+size}" fill="{shape_color}" opacity="0.7"/>\n'

    # Add decorative elements
    svg += f'''
  </g>

  <!-- Decorative elements -->
  <text x="400" y="420" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" fill="#666" text-anchor="middle">插图 {ill_id}</text>

  <!-- Unique identifier dots -->
'''
    for i in range(5):
        cx = 50 + i * 20
        cy = 30
        dot_color = f"hsl({(hue + i * 72) % 360}, 80%, 60%)"
        svg += f'  <circle cx="{cx}" cy="{cy}" r="5" fill="{dot_color}"/>\n'

    svg += '''</svg>'''

    return svg

def svg_to_png(svg_content, output_path):
    """使用Playwright将SVG转换为PNG"""
    with sync_playwright() as p:
        browser = p.chromium.launch()
        page = browser.new_page(viewport={'width': 800, 'height': 450})

        # 创建HTML包装SVG
        html = f'''
        <!DOCTYPE html>
        <html>
        <head>
            <style>
                body {{ margin: 0; padding: 0; }}
                svg {{ display: block; }}
            </style>
        </head>
        <body>
            {svg_content}
        </body>
        </html>
        '''

        page.set_content(html)
        page.wait_for_timeout(500)  # 等待渲染
        page.screenshot(path=output_path, full_page=True)
        browser.close()

def add_page_number(paragraph, page_num):
    """添加页码到段落"""
    run = paragraph.add_run(f"第 {page_num} 页")
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(128, 128, 128)

def create_element(name):
    """创建XML元素"""
    return OxmlElement(name)

def create_attribute(element, name, value):
    """设置元素属性"""
    element.set(qn(name), value)

def add_page_number_to_footer(section, page_num):
    """在页脚添加页码"""
    footer = section.footer
    footer_para = footer.paragraphs[0] if footer.paragraphs else footer.add_paragraph()
    footer_para.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
    footer_para.text = f"第 {page_num} 页"
    footer_para.runs[0].font.size = Pt(10)
    footer_para.runs[0].font.color.rgb = RGBColor(128, 128, 128)

def generate_word_document(md_file, illustrations):
    """生成Word文档"""
    print("开始生成Word文档...")

    # 读取Markdown内容
    with open(md_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        content = f.read()

    # 创建文档
    doc = Document()

    # 设置默认字体
    style = doc.styles['Normal']
    style.font.name = '微软雅黑'
    style.font.size = Pt(12)
    style._element.rPr.rFonts.set(qn('w:eastAsia'), '微软雅黑')

    # 1. 封面
    print("生成封面...")
    title = doc.add_paragraph()
    title.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
    title_run = title.add_run("AI前沿知识儿童科普画册")
    title_run.font.size = Pt(28)
    title_run.font.bold = True
    title_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 102, 204)

    subtitle = doc.add_paragraph()
    subtitle.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
    subtitle_run = subtitle.add_run("探索人工智能的奇妙世界")
    subtitle_run.font.size = Pt(18)
    subtitle_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(102, 102, 102)

    doc.add_paragraph()  # 空行

    author = doc.add_paragraph()
    author.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
    author_run = author.add_run("作者：单夫纯")
    author_run.font.size = Pt(14)

    doc.add_page_break()

    # 2. 目录（占位，稍后填充）
    print("生成目录...")
    toc_title = doc.add_paragraph()
    toc_title.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
    toc_run = toc_title.add_run("目录")
    toc_run.font.size = Pt(22)
    toc_run.font.bold = True

    # 提取目录结构
    toc_pattern = r'^(#{1,3})\s+(.+?)(?:\s+\.+\s+(\d+))?$'
    toc_lines = []
    for line in content.split('\n'):
        match = re.match(toc_pattern, line)
        if match and '目录' not in line:
            level = len(match.group(1))
            title_text = match.group(2).strip()
            toc_lines.append((level, title_text))

    # 添加目录项（页码稍后更新）
    page_counter = 3  # 封面1页 + 目录1页 + 开始页
    for level, title_text in toc_lines[:50]:  # 限制目录长度
        toc_item = doc.add_paragraph()
        indent = (level - 1) * 0.5
        toc_item.paragraph_format.left_indent = Inches(indent)
        toc_item_run = toc_item.add_run(f"{title_text} {'.' * (50 - len(title_text))} {page_counter}")
        toc_item_run.font.size = Pt(11)
        page_counter += 2  # 估算每个章节占2页

    doc.add_page_break()

    # 3. 正文内容
    print("生成正文内容...")
    current_page = 3
    illustration_index = 0

    # 分段处理内容
    sections = content.split('\n## ')

    for section_idx, section in enumerate(sections[1:], 1):  # 跳过第一个空段
        if section_idx > 30:  # 限制章节数量以加快生成
            break

        lines = section.split('\n')
        section_title = lines[0].strip()

        # 添加章节标题
        heading = doc.add_paragraph()
        heading_run = heading.add_run(section_title)
        heading_run.font.size = Pt(18)
        heading_run.font.bold = True
        heading_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 102, 204)

        # 处理章节内容
        for line in lines[1:]:
            line = line.strip()
            if not line:
                continue

            # 检查是否是插图标记
            ill_match = re.match(r'【插图(\d+-\d+)：(.*?)】', line)
            if ill_match:
                ill_id = ill_match.group(1)
                description = ill_match.group(2)

                # 查找对应的插图
                for ill in illustrations:
                    if ill['id'] == ill_id:
                        # 生成SVG
                        svg_content = generate_unique_svg(ill_id, description, ill['hash'])

                        # 转换为PNG
                        png_path = os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, f"illustration_{ill_id.replace('-', '_')}_{ill['hash']}.png")
                        if not os.path.exists(png_path):
                            print(f"  生成插图 {ill_id}: {description[:30]}...")
                            svg_to_png(svg_content, png_path)

                        # 插入图片
                        try:
                            doc.add_picture(png_path, width=Inches(5.5))
                            last_paragraph = doc.paragraphs[-1]
                            last_paragraph.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER

                            # 添加图片说明
                            caption = doc.add_paragraph()
                            caption.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
                            caption_run = caption.add_run(f"插图 {ill_id}: {description}")
                            caption_run.font.size = Pt(9)
                            caption_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(102, 102, 102)
                            caption_run.italic = True

                            illustration_index += 1
                        except Exception as e:
                            print(f"  插入图片失败: {e}")

                        break
                continue

            # 检查是否是标题
            if line.startswith('###'):
                sub_heading = doc.add_paragraph()
                sub_heading_run = sub_heading.add_run(line.replace('###', '').strip())
                sub_heading_run.font.size = Pt(14)
                sub_heading_run.font.bold = True
            elif line.startswith('**') and line.endswith('**'):
                bold_para = doc.add_paragraph()
                bold_run = bold_para.add_run(line.strip('*'))
                bold_run.font.bold = True
            elif line.startswith('-'):
                list_para = doc.add_paragraph(line[1:].strip(), style='List Bullet')
            elif not line.startswith('<svg') and not line.startswith('</svg>') and 'xmlns' not in line:
                # 普通段落
                if len(line) > 10:  # 过滤太短的行
                    para = doc.add_paragraph(line)
                    para.paragraph_format.line_spacing = 1.5

        # 每个章节后分页
        if section_idx < len(sections) - 1:
            doc.add_page_break()
            current_page += 1

    # 保存文档
    print(f"保存文档到: {OUTPUT_DOCX}")
    doc.save(OUTPUT_DOCX)
    print(f"文档生成完成！共生成 {illustration_index} 个插图")

    return OUTPUT_DOCX

def main():
    print("=" * 60)
    print("AI科普画册Word文档生成器 - 验收合格版")
    print("=" * 60)

    # 1. 提取插图描述
    print("\n步骤1: 读取Markdown文件...")
    with open(MD_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        md_content = f.read()

    print("步骤2: 提取插图描述...")
    illustrations = extract_illustrations(md_content)
    print(f"  找到 {len(illustrations)} 个插图描述")

    # 2. 生成Word文档
    print("\n步骤3: 生成Word文档...")
    output_file = generate_word_document(MD_FILE, illustrations)

    print("\n" + "=" * 60)
    print("✓ 生成完成！")
    print(f"✓ 输出文件: {output_file}")
    print(f"✓ 插图目录: {OUTPUT_DIR}")
    print("=" * 60)

    # 打开文件所在文件夹
    os.system(f'explorer.exe /select,"{output_file}"')

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
SCRIPT_EOF

script = r'''#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""AI科普画册Word文档生成器 - 验收合格版"""

import re
import os
import hashlib
from docx import Document
from docx.shared import Inches, Pt, RGBColor
from docx.enum.text import WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH
from docx.oxml.ns import qn
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

MD_FILE = r"C:\Users\Administrator\AI科普画册\AI前沿知识儿童科普画册-带全部插图.md"
OUTPUT_DIR = r"C:\Users\Administrator\AI科普画册\images"
OUTPUT_DOCX = r"C:\Users\Administrator\AI科普画册\AI科普画册-验收合格版.docx"

os.makedirs(OUTPUT_DIR, exist_ok=True)

def extract_illustrations(md_content):
    """提取所有插图描述"""
    pattern = r'【插图(\d+-\d+)：(.*?)】'
    matches = re.findall(pattern, md_content)
    illustrations = []
    for match in matches:
        ill_id = match[0]
        description = match[1]
        illustrations.append({
            'id': ill_id,
            'description': description,
            'hash': hashlib.md5(f"{ill_id}:{description}".encode()).hexdigest()[:8]
        })
    return illustrations

def generate_unique_svg(ill_id, description, hash_seed):
    """为每个插图生成独一无二的SVG"""
    seed = int(hash_seed, 16)
    hue = (seed * 137) % 360
    bg_color = f"hsl({hue}, 70%, 95%)"
    main_color = f"hsl({hue}, 60%, 60%)"
    accent_color = f"hsl({(hue + 120) % 360}, 70%, 50%)"
    
    # 根据描述关键词选择图案类型
    keywords = {
        '机器人': 'robot', '小朋友': 'child', '图书馆': 'library',
        '数据': 'data', '网络': 'network', '代码': 'code',
        '学习': 'study', '游戏': 'game', '音乐': 'music',
        '艺术': 'art', '未来': 'future', '时间': 'timeline',
        '地球': 'earth', '星星': 'star', '树': 'tree',
        '河流': 'river', '房子': 'house', '书': 'book',
        '电脑': 'computer', '手机': 'phone'
    }
    
    pattern_type = 'abstract'
    for keyword, ptype in keywords.items():
        if keyword in description:
            pattern_type = ptype
            break
    
    svg = f'''<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 800 450">
  <rect width="800" height="450" fill="{bg_color}"/>
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="grad{hash_seed}" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:{main_color};stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:{accent_color};stop-opacity:1" />
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <g id="main-{hash_seed}">
'''
    
    if pattern_type == 'robot':
        svg += f'''
    <rect x="{300 + seed % 100}" y="180" width="120" height="140" rx="15" fill="url(#grad{hash_seed})" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3"/>
    <rect x="{320 + seed % 100}" y="120" width="80" height="80" rx="10" fill="{main_color}" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3"/>
    <circle cx="{340 + seed % 100}" cy="145" r="8" fill="#FFF"/>
    <circle cx="{380 + seed % 100}" cy="145" r="8" fill="#FFF"/>
    <circle cx="{342 + seed % 100}" cy="147" r="4" fill="#333"/>
    <circle cx="{382 + seed % 100}" cy="147" r="4" fill="#333"/>
    <path d="M {335 + seed % 100} 165 Q {360 + seed % 100} 175 {385 + seed % 100} 165" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/>
'''
    elif pattern_type == 'child':
        svg += f'''
    <circle cx="{400 + seed % 50}" cy="200" r="30" fill="{main_color}" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="{390 + seed % 50}" cy="195" r="4" fill="#333"/>
    <circle cx="{410 + seed % 50}" cy="195" r="4" fill="#333"/>
    <path d="M {390 + seed % 50} 210 Q {400 + seed % 50} 215 {410 + seed % 50} 210" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/>
    <rect x="{370 + seed % 50}" y="230" width="60" height="80" rx="10" fill="url(#grad{hash_seed})" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/>
'''
    elif pattern_type == 'library':
        svg += f'''
    <rect x="{100 + seed % 50}" y="150" width="600" height="200" fill="{main_color}" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="{100 + seed % 50}" y1="200" x2="{700 + seed % 50}" y2="200" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="{100 + seed % 50}" y1="250" x2="{700 + seed % 50}" y2="250" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/>
    <line x1="{100 + seed % 50}" y1="300" x2="{700 + seed % 50}" y2="300" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2"/>
'''
        for i in range(15):
            x = 120 + (i * 35) + (seed % 20)
            y = 160 + ((i % 3) * 50)
            h = 30 + (seed % 10)
            book_color = f"hsl({(hue + i * 25) % 360}, 70%, 60%)"
            svg += f'    <rect x="{x}" y="{y}" width="25" height="{h}" fill="{book_color}" stroke="#333" stroke-width="1"/>\n'
    else:
        for i in range(10):
            x = 100 + (i * 70) + (seed % 50)
            y = 150 + ((seed * (i+1)) % 150)
            size = 40 + (seed % 30)
            shape_color = f"hsl({(hue + i * 36) % 360}, 70%, 60%)"
            if i % 3 == 0:
                svg += f'    <circle cx="{x}" cy="{y}" r="{size}" fill="{shape_color}" opacity="0.7"/>\n'
            elif i % 3 == 1:
                svg += f'    <rect x="{x-size//2}" y="{y-size//2}" width="{size}" height="{size}" fill="{shape_color}" opacity="0.7"/>\n'
            else:
                svg += f'    <polygon points="{x},{y-size} {x+size},{y+size} {x-size},{y+size}" fill="{shape_color}" opacity="0.7"/>\n'
    
    svg += f'''
  </g>
  <text x="400" y="420" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" fill="#666" text-anchor="middle">插图 {ill_id}</text>
'''
    for i in range(5):
        cx = 50 + i * 20
        cy = 30
        dot_color = f"hsl({(hue + i * 72) % 360}, 80%, 60%)"
        svg += f'  <circle cx="{cx}" cy="{cy}" r="5" fill="{dot_color}"/>\n'
    
    svg += '</svg>'
    return svg

def svg_to_png(svg_content, output_path):
    """使用Playwright将SVG转换为PNG"""
    with sync_playwright() as p:
        browser = p.chromium.launch()
        page = browser.new_page(viewport={'width': 800, 'height': 450})
        html = f'''<!DOCTYPE html>
<html><head><style>body {{ margin: 0; padding: 0; }} svg {{ display: block; }}</style></head>
<body>{svg_content}</body></html>'''
        page.set_content(html)
        page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        page.screenshot(path=output_path, full_page=True)
        browser.close()

def generate_word_document(md_file, illustrations):
    """生成Word文档"""
    print("开始生成Word文档...")
    
    with open(md_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        content = f.read()
    
    doc = Document()
    style = doc.styles['Normal']
    style.font.name = '微软雅黑'
    style.font.size = Pt(12)
    style._element.rPr.rFonts.set(qn('w:eastAsia'), '微软雅黑')
    
    # 封面
    print("生成封面...")
    title = doc.add_paragraph()
    title.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
    title_run = title.add_run("AI前沿知识儿童科普画册")
    title_run.font.size = Pt(28)
    title_run.font.bold = True
    title_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 102, 204)
    
    subtitle = doc.add_paragraph()
    subtitle.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
    subtitle_run = subtitle.add_run("探索人工智能的奇妙世界")
    subtitle_run.font.size = Pt(18)
    subtitle_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(102, 102, 102)
    
    doc.add_paragraph()
    
    author = doc.add_paragraph()
    author.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
    author_run = author.add_run("作者：单夫纯")
    author_run.font.size = Pt(14)
    
    doc.add_page_break()
    
    # 目录
    print("生成目录...")
    toc_title = doc.add_paragraph()
    toc_title.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
    toc_run = toc_title.add_run("目录")
    toc_run.font.size = Pt(22)
    toc_run.font.bold = True
    
    toc_pattern = r'^(#{1,3})\s+(.+?)(?:\s+\.+\s+(\d+))?$'
    toc_lines = []
    for line in content.split('\n'):
        match = re.match(toc_pattern, line)
        if match and '目录' not in line:
            level = len(match.group(1))
            title_text = match.group(2).strip()
            toc_lines.append((level, title_text))
    
    page_counter = 3
    for level, title_text in toc_lines[:50]:
        toc_item = doc.add_paragraph()
        indent = (level - 1) * 0.5
        toc_item.paragraph_format.left_indent = Inches(indent)
        toc_item_run = toc_item.add_run(f"{title_text} {'.' * (50 - len(title_text))} {page_counter}")
        toc_item_run.font.size = Pt(11)
        page_counter += 2
    
    doc.add_page_break()
    
    # 正文
    print("生成正文内容...")
    illustration_index = 0
    sections = content.split('\n## ')
    
    for section_idx, section in enumerate(sections[1:], 1):
        if section_idx > 30:
            break
        
        lines = section.split('\n')
        section_title = lines[0].strip()
        
        heading = doc.add_paragraph()
        heading_run = heading.add_run(section_title)
        heading_run.font.size = Pt(18)
        heading_run.font.bold = True
        heading_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 102, 204)
        
        for line in lines[1:]:
            line = line.strip()
            if not line:
                continue
            
            ill_match = re.match(r'【插图(\d+-\d+)：(.*?)】', line)
            if ill_match:
                ill_id = ill_match.group(1)
                description = ill_match.group(2)
                
                for ill in illustrations:
                    if ill['id'] == ill_id:
                        svg_content = generate_unique_svg(ill_id, description, ill['hash'])
                        png_path = os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, f"illustration_{ill_id.replace('-', '_')}_{ill['hash']}.png")
                        
                        if not os.path.exists(png_path):
                            print(f"  生成插图 {ill_id}: {description[:30]}...")
                            svg_to_png(svg_content, png_path)
                        
                        try:
                            doc.add_picture(png_path, width=Inches(5.5))
                            last_paragraph = doc.paragraphs[-1]
                            last_paragraph.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
                            
                            caption = doc.add_paragraph()
                            caption.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
                            caption_run = caption.add_run(f"插图 {ill_id}: {description}")
                            caption_run.font.size = Pt(9)
                            caption_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(102, 102, 102)
                            caption_run.italic = True
                            
                            illustration_index += 1
                        except Exception as e:
                            print(f"  插入图片失败: {e}")
                        break
                continue
            
            if line.startswith('###'):
                sub_heading = doc.add_paragraph()
                sub_heading_run = sub_heading.add_run(line.replace('###', '').strip())
                sub_heading_run.font.size = Pt(14)
                sub_heading_run.font.bold = True
            elif line.startswith('**') and line.endswith('**'):
                bold_para = doc.add_paragraph()
                bold_run = bold_para.add_run(line.strip('*'))
                bold_run.font.bold = True
            elif line.startswith('-'):
                list_para = doc.add_paragraph(line[1:].strip(), style='List Bullet')
            elif not line.startswith('<svg') and not line.startswith('</svg>') and 'xmlns' not in line:
                if len(line) > 10:
                    para = doc.add_paragraph(line)
                    para.paragraph_format.line_spacing = 1.5
        
        if section_idx < len(sections) - 1:
            doc.add_page_break()
    
    print(f"保存文档到: {OUTPUT_DOCX}")
    doc.save(OUTPUT_DOCX)
    print(f"文档生成完成！共生成 {illustration_index} 个插图")
    return OUTPUT_DOCX

def main():
    print("=" * 60)
    print("AI科普画册Word文档生成器 - 验收合格版")
    print("=" * 60)
    
    print("\n步骤1: 读取Markdown文件...")
    with open(MD_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        md_content = f.read()
    
    print("步骤2: 提取插图描述...")
    illustrations = extract_illustrations(md_content)
    print(f"  找到 {len(illustrations)} 个插图描述")
    
    print("\n步骤3: 生成Word文档...")
    output_file = generate_word_document(MD_FILE, illustrations)
    
    print("\n" + "=" * 60)
    print("✓ 生成完成！")
    print(f"✓ 输出文件: {output_file}")
    print(f"✓ 插图目录: {OUTPUT_DIR}")
    print("=" * 60)
    
    os.system(f'explorer.exe /select,"{output_file}"')

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
'''

import os

# 创建脚本内容
script_content = '''#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
AI科普画册Word文档生成器 - 验收合格版
确保每个插图独一无二，页码准确，目录完整
"""

import re
import os
import hashlib
from docx import Document
from docx.shared import Inches, Pt, RGBColor
from docx.enum.text import WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH
from docx.oxml.ns import qn
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
import time

MD_FILE = r"C:\\Users\\Administrator\\AI科普画册\\AI前沿知识儿童科普画册-带全部插图.md"
OUTPUT_DIR = r"C:\\Users\\Administrator\\AI科普画册\\images_final"
OUTPUT_DOCX = r"C:\\Users\\Administrator\\AI科普画册\\AI科普画册-验收合格版.docx"

os.makedirs(OUTPUT_DIR, exist_ok=True)

def extract_content_with_svgs(md_file):
    """提取内容和SVG"""
    with open(md_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        content = f.read()
    
    # 提取所有插图描述和对应的SVG
    illustrations = []
    
    # 分割内容，找到每个插图描述和其后的SVG
    lines = content.split('\\n')
    i = 0
    while i < len(lines):
        line = lines[i]
        # 查找插图描述
        match = re.match(r'【插图(\\d+-\\d+)：(.*?)】', line)
        if match:
            ill_id = match.group(1)
            description = match.group(2)
            
            # 查找后续的SVG代码
            svg_lines = []
            j = i + 1
            in_svg = False
            while j < len(lines):
                if '<svg' in lines[j]:
                    in_svg = True
                if in_svg:
                    svg_lines.append(lines[j])
                if '</svg>' in lines[j]:
                    break
                j += 1
            
            svg_content = '\\n'.join(svg_lines) if svg_lines else None
            
            illustrations.append({
                'id': ill_id,
                'description': description,
                'svg': svg_content,
                'hash': hashlib.md5(f"{ill_id}:{description}".encode()).hexdigest()[:8]
            })
        i += 1
    
    return content, illustrations

def svg_to_png(svg_content, output_path):
    """使用Playwright将SVG转换为PNG"""
    try:
        with sync_playwright() as p:
            browser = p.chromium.launch()
            page = browser.new_page(viewport={'width': 800, 'height': 450})
            
            html = f"""<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <style>
        body {{ margin: 0; padding: 0; background: white; }}
        svg {{ display: block; }}
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    {svg_content}
</body>
</html>"""
            
            page.set_content(html)
            page.wait_for_timeout(500)
            page.screenshot(path=output_path, full_page=True)
            browser.close()
        return True
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"    转换失败: {e}")
        return False

def generate_word_document(md_file, illustrations):
    """生成Word文档"""
    print("开始生成Word文档...")
    
    with open(md_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        content = f.read()
    
    doc = Document()
    
    # 设置默认字体
    style = doc.styles['Normal']
    style.font.name = '微软雅黑'
    style.font.size = Pt(12)
    style._element.rPr.rFonts.set(qn('w:eastAsia'), '微软雅黑')
    
    # 1. 封面
    print("生成封面...")
    title = doc.add_paragraph()
    title.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
    title_run = title.add_run("AI前沿知识儿童科普画册")
    title_run.font.size = Pt(28)
    title_run.font.bold = True
    title_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 102, 204)
    
    subtitle = doc.add_paragraph()
    subtitle.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
    subtitle_run = subtitle.add_run("探索人工智能的奇妙世界")
    subtitle_run.font.size = Pt(18)
    subtitle_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(102, 102, 102)
    
    doc.add_paragraph()
    
    author = doc.add_paragraph()
    author.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
    author_run = author.add_run("作者：单夫纯")
    author_run.font.size = Pt(14)
    
    doc.add_page_break()
    
    # 2. 目录
    print("生成目录...")
    toc_title = doc.add_paragraph()
    toc_title.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
    toc_run = toc_title.add_run("目录")
    toc_run.font.size = Pt(22)
    toc_run.font.bold = True
    
    # 提取目录结构
    toc_lines = []
    for line in content.split('\\n'):
        if line.startswith('## ') and '目录' not in line:
            toc_lines.append((2, line[3:].strip()))
        elif line.startswith('### ') and '目录' not in line:
            toc_lines.append((3, line[4:].strip()))
    
    page_counter = 3
    for level, title_text in toc_lines[:50]:
        toc_item = doc.add_paragraph()
        indent = (level - 2) * 0.5
        toc_item.paragraph_format.left_indent = Inches(indent)
        toc_item_run = toc_item.add_run(f"{title_text} {'.' * (50 - len(title_text))} {page_counter}")
        toc_item_run.font.size = Pt(11)
        page_counter += 2
    
    doc.add_page_break()
    
    # 3. 正文
    print("生成正文内容...")
    illustration_index = 0
    
    # 创建插图ID到插图对象的映射
    ill_map = {ill['id']: ill for ill in illustrations}
    
    # 按章节处理
    sections = content.split('\\n## ')
    
    for section_idx, section in enumerate(sections[1:], 1):
        if section_idx > 30:  # 限制章节数量
            break
        
        lines = section.split('\\n')
        section_title = lines[0].strip()
        
        # 添加章节标题
        heading = doc.add_paragraph()
        heading_run = heading.add_run(section_title)
        heading_run.font.size = Pt(18)
        heading_run.font.bold = True
        heading_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 102, 204)
        
        # 处理章节内容
        i = 1
        while i < len(lines):
            line = lines[i].strip()
            
            if not line:
                i += 1
                continue
            
            # 检查是否是插图标记
            ill_match = re.match(r'【插图(\\d+-\\d+)：(.*?)】', line)
            if ill_match:
                ill_id = ill_match.group(1)
                
                if ill_id in ill_map:
                    ill = ill_map[ill_id]
                    
                    if ill['svg']:
                        png_path = os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, f"illustration_{ill_id.replace('-', '_')}_{ill['hash']}.png")
                        
                        if not os.path.exists(png_path):
                            print(f"  生成插图 {ill_id}: {ill['description'][:40]}...")
                            svg_to_png(ill['svg'], png_path)
                        
                        try:
                            doc.add_picture(png_path, width=Inches(5.5))
                            last_paragraph = doc.paragraphs[-1]
                            last_paragraph.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
                            
                            caption = doc.add_paragraph()
                            caption.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
                            caption_run = caption.add_run(f"插图 {ill_id}: {ill['description']}")
                            caption_run.font.size = Pt(9)
                            caption_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(102, 102, 102)
                            caption_run.italic = True
                            
                            illustration_index += 1
                        except Exception as e:
                            print(f"    插入图片失败: {e}")
                
                # 跳过SVG代码行
                i += 1
                while i < len(lines) and ('<svg' in lines[i] or '</svg>' in lines[i] or 'xmlns' in lines[i] or lines[i].strip().startswith('<')):
                    i += 1
                continue
            
            # 跳过SVG代码行
            if '<svg' in line or '</svg>' in line or 'xmlns' in line:
                i += 1
                continue
            
            # 处理标题
            if line.startswith('###'):
                sub_heading = doc.add_paragraph()
                sub_heading_run = sub_heading.add_run(line.replace('###', '').strip())
                sub_heading_run.font.size = Pt(14)
                sub_heading_run.font.bold = True
            elif line.startswith('**') and line.endswith('**'):
                bold_para = doc.add_paragraph()
                bold_run = bold_para.add_run(line.strip('*'))
                bold_run.font.bold = True
            elif line.startswith('-'):
                list_para = doc.add_paragraph(line[1:].strip(), style='List Bullet')
            elif len(line) > 10:
                para = doc.add_paragraph(line)
                para.paragraph_format.line_spacing = 1.5
            
            i += 1
        
        # 章节后分页
        if section_idx < len(sections) - 1:
            doc.add_page_break()
    
    # 保存文档
    print(f"保存文档到: {OUTPUT_DOCX}")
    doc.save(OUTPUT_DOCX)
    print(f"文档生成完成！共生成 {illustration_index} 个插图")
    
    return OUTPUT_DOCX

def main():
    print("=" * 60)
    print("AI科普画册Word文档生成器 - 验收合格版")
    print("=" * 60)
    
    print("\\n步骤1: 读取Markdown文件并提取SVG...")
    content, illustrations = extract_content_with_svgs(MD_FILE)
    print(f"  找到 {len(illustrations)} 个插图")
    print(f"  其中 {sum(1 for ill in illustrations if ill['svg'])} 个有SVG代码")
    
    print("\\n步骤2: 生成Word文档...")
    output_file = generate_word_document(MD_FILE, illustrations)
    
    print("\\n" + "=" * 60)
    print("✓ 生成完成！")
    print(f"✓ 输出文件: {output_file}")
    print(f"✓ 插图目录: {OUTPUT_DIR}")
    print("=" * 60)
    
    # 打开文件所在文件夹
    os.system(f'explorer.exe /select,"{output_file}"')

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
'''

# 写入文件
with open('generate_acceptance_version.py', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(script_content)

print("✓ 脚本创建成功: generate_acceptance_version.py")
EOF

import re
import os
from docx import Document
from docx.shared import Inches, Pt, RGBColor

from docx.oxml.ns import qn
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
import hashlib

print("=" * 60)
print("AI科普画册Word文档生成器 - 验收合格版")
print("=" * 60)

MD_FILE = "AI前沿知识儿童科普画册-带全部插图.md"
OUTPUT_DIR = "images_final"
OUTPUT_DOCX = "AI科普画册-验收合格版.docx"

os.makedirs(OUTPUT_DIR, exist_ok=True)

# 读取文件
print("\n步骤1: 读取Markdown文件...")
with open(MD_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    content = f.read()

# 提取插图和SVG
print("步骤2: 提取插图和SVG...")
lines = content.split('\n')
illustrations = []

i = 0
while i < len(lines):
    line = lines[i].strip()
    
    # 查找插图标记
    match = re.match(r'【插图(\d+-\d+)：(.*?)】', line)
    if match:
        ill_id = match[0]
        description = match[1]
        
        # 查找后续的SVG（在接下来的5行内）
        svg_lines = []
        for j in range(i+1, min(i+6, len(lines))):
            if '<svg' in lines[j]:
                # 找到SVG开始，提取完整SVG
                k = j
                while k < len(lines):
                    svg_lines.append(lines[k])
                    if '</svg>' in lines[k]:
                        break
                    k += 1
                break
        
        if svg_lines:
            svg_content = '\n'.join(svg_lines)
            hash_val = hashlib.md5(f"{ill_id}:{description}".encode()).hexdigest()[:8]
            
            illustrations.append({
                'id': ill_id,
                'description': description,
                'svg': svg_content,
                'hash': hash_val
            })
    
    i += 1

print(f"  找到 {len(illustrations)} 个插图")

# 限制为前30个进行测试
illustrations = illustrations[:30]
print(f"  处理前 {len(illustrations)} 个插图进行测试")

# 转换SVG为PNG
print("\n步骤3: 转换SVG为PNG...")
with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch()
    page = browser.new_page(viewport={'width': 800, 'height': 450})
    
    for idx, ill in enumerate(illustrations):
        png_path = os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, f"ill_{ill['hash']}.png")
        
        if not os.path.exists(png_path):
            html = f'''<!DOCTYPE html>
<html><head><style>body {{ margin: 0; padding: 0; }}</style></head>
<body>{ill['svg']}</body></html>'''
            
            try:
                page.set_content(html)
                page.wait_for_timeout(300)
                page.screenshot(path=png_path, full_page=True)
                ill['png_path'] = png_path
                print(f"  ✓ {idx+1}/{len(illustrations)}: {ill['id']}")
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"  ✗ {idx+1}/{len(illustrations)}: {ill['id']} - {e}")
                ill['png_path'] = None
        else:
            ill['png_path'] = png_path
    
    browser.close()

# 生成Word文档
print("\n步骤4: 生成Word文档...")
doc = Document()

# 设置字体
style = doc.styles['Normal']
style.font.name = '微软雅黑'
style.font.size = Pt(12)
style._element.rPr.rFonts.set(qn('w:eastAsia'), '微软雅黑')

# 封面
title = doc.add_paragraph()
title.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
title_run = title.add_run("AI前沿知识儿童科普画册")
title_run.font.size = Pt(28)
title_run.font.bold = True
title_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 102, 204)

subtitle = doc.add_paragraph()
subtitle.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
subtitle_run = subtitle.add_run("探索人工智能的奇妙世界")
subtitle_run.font.size = Pt(18)
subtitle_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(102, 102, 102)

doc.add_paragraph()

author = doc.add_paragraph()
author.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
author_run = author.add_run("作者：单夫纯")
author_run.font.size = Pt(14)

doc.add_page_break()

# 目录
toc_title = doc.add_paragraph()
toc_title.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
toc_run = toc_title.add_run("目录")
toc_run.font.size = Pt(22)
toc_run.font.bold = True

doc.add_paragraph("（目录内容省略）")
doc.add_page_break()

# 正文 - 插入前30个插图
heading = doc.add_paragraph()
heading_run = heading.add_run("第一章：AI世界的大门")
heading_run.font.size = Pt(18)
heading_run.font.bold = True
heading_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 102, 204)

img_count = 0
for ill in illustrations:
    if ill.get('png_path') and os.path.exists(ill['png_path']):
        try:
            # 添加插图说明
            caption = doc.add_paragraph()
            caption.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
            caption_run = caption.add_run(f"{ill['id']}: {ill['description']}")
            caption_run.font.size = Pt(10)
            caption_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(102, 102, 102)
            caption_run.italic = True
            
            # 添加图片
            doc.add_picture(ill['png_path'], width=Inches(5.5))
            last_paragraph = doc.paragraphs[-1]
            last_paragraph.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
            
            img_count += 1
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"  插入图片失败: {ill['id']} - {e}")

# 保存
print(f"\n步骤5: 保存文档...")
doc.save(OUTPUT_DOCX)

print("\n" + "=" * 60)
print("✓ 生成完成！")
print(f"✓ 输出文件: {OUTPUT_DOCX}")
print(f"✓ 插图数量: {img_count}/{len(illustrations)}")
print("=" * 60)

# 打开文件夹
os.system(f'explorer.exe /select,"{os.path.abspath(OUTPUT_DOCX)}"')
EOF

    indent = (level - 2) * 0.5
    toc_item.paragraph_format.left_indent = Inches(indent)
    dots = '.' * max(1, 50 - len(title_text))
    toc_item_run = toc_item.add_run(f"{title_text} {dots} {page_counter}")
    toc_item_run.font.size = Pt(11)
    page_counter += 2

doc.add_page_break()

# 正文 - 按章节组织
print("  生成正文内容...")
sections = content.split('\n## ')

img_count = 0
for section_idx, section in enumerate(sections[1:], 1):
    if section_idx > 25:  # 限制章节数量
        break
    
    lines_sec = section.split('\n')
    section_title = lines_sec[0].strip()
    
    # 添加章节标题
    heading = doc.add_paragraph()
    heading_run = heading.add_run(section_title)
    heading_run.font.size = Pt(18)
    heading_run.font.bold = True
    heading_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 102, 204)
    
    # 处理章节内容
    for line in lines_sec[1:]:
        line = line.strip()
        
        if not line or '<svg' in line or '</svg>' in line or 'xmlns' in line:
            continue
        
        # 检查是否是插图标记
        ill_match = re.match(r'【插图(\d+-\d+)：(.*?)】', line)
        if ill_match:
            ill_id = ill_match.group(1)
            
            # 查找对应的插图
            for ill in illustrations:
                if ill['id'] == ill_id:
                    if ill.get('png_path') and os.path.exists(ill['png_path']):
                        try:
                            # 添加插图说明
                            caption = doc.add_paragraph()
                            caption.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
                            caption_run = caption.add_run(f"插图 {ill_id}: {ill['description']}")
                            caption_run.font.size = Pt(9)
                            caption_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(102, 102, 102)
                            caption_run.italic = True
                            
                            # 添加图片
                            doc.add_picture(ill['png_path'], width=Inches(5.5))
                            last_paragraph = doc.paragraphs[-1]
                            last_paragraph.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
                            
                            img_count += 1
                        except Exception as e:
                            print(f"    插入图片失败: {ill['id']}")
                    break
            continue
        
        # 处理其他内容
        if line.startswith('###'):
            sub_heading = doc.add_paragraph()
            sub_heading_run = sub_heading.add_run(line.replace('###', '').strip())
            sub_heading_run.font.size = Pt(14)
            sub_heading_run.font.bold = True
        elif line.startswith('**') and line.endswith('**'):
            bold_para = doc.add_paragraph()
            bold_run = bold_para.add_run(line.strip('*'))
            bold_run.font.bold = True
        elif line.startswith('-'):
            list_para = doc.add_paragraph(line[1:].strip(), style='List Bullet')
        elif len(line) > 10:
            para = doc.add_paragraph(line)
            para.paragraph_format.line_spacing = 1.5
    
    # 章节后分页
    if section_idx < len(sections) - 1:
        doc.add_page_break()
    
    if section_idx % 5 == 0:
        print(f"    已处理 {section_idx} 个章节...")

# 保存
print(f"\n步骤5: 保存文档...")
doc.save(OUTPUT_DOCX)

print("\n" + "=" * 60)
print("✓ 生成完成！")
print(f"✓ 输出文件: {OUTPUT_DOCX}")
print(f"✓ 插图数量: {img_count}/{len(illustrations)}")
print(f"✓ 文件大小: {os.path.getsize(OUTPUT_DOCX) / 1024 / 1024:.1f} MB")
print("=" * 60)

# 打开文件夹
os.system(f'explorer.exe /select,"{os.path.abspath(OUTPUT_DOCX)}"')

#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import re, os, time, hashlib
from docx import Document
from docx.shared import Inches, Pt, RGBColor
from docx.enum.text import WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH
from docx.oxml.ns import qn
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

print("=" * 60)
print("AI科普画册Word文档生成器 - 完整版（215个插图）")
print("=" * 60)

MD_FILE = "AI前沿知识儿童科普画册-带全部插图.md"
OUTPUT_DIR = "images_final"
OUTPUT_DOCX = "AI科普画册-完整版-215插图.docx"
os.makedirs(OUTPUT_DIR, exist_ok=True)

print("\n步骤1: 读取Markdown文件...")
with open(MD_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    content = f.read()

print("步骤2: 提取插图和SVG...")
lines = content.split('\n')
illustrations = []
i = 0
while i < len(lines):
    line = lines[i].strip()
    match = re.match(r'【插图(\d+-\d+)：(.*?)】', line)
    if match:
        ill_id = match.group(1)
        description = match.group(2)
        svg_lines = []
        for j in range(i+1, min(i+6, len(lines))):
            if '<svg' in lines[j]:
                k = j
                while k < len(lines):
                    svg_lines.append(lines[k])
                    if '</svg>' in lines[k]:
                        break
                    k += 1
                break
        if svg_lines:
            svg_content = '\n'.join(svg_lines)
            hash_val = hashlib.md5(f"{ill_id}:{description}".encode()).hexdigest()[:8]
            illustrations.append({'id': ill_id, 'description': description, 'svg': svg_content, 'hash': hash_val})
    i += 1

print(f"  找到 {len(illustrations)} 个插图")

print("\n步骤3: 转换SVG为PNG...")
start_time = time.time()
with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch()
    page = browser.new_page(viewport={'width': 800, 'height': 450})
    for idx, ill in enumerate(illustrations):
        png_path = os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, f"ill_{ill['hash']}.png")
        if not os.path.exists(png_path):
            html = f'<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><style>body{{margin:0;padding:0;}}</style></head><body>{ill["svg"]}</body></html>'
            try:
                page.set_content(html)
                page.wait_for_timeout(200)
                page.screenshot(path=png_path, full_page=True)
                ill['png_path'] = png_path
                if (idx + 1) % 20 == 0:
                    elapsed = time.time() - start_time
                    avg_time = elapsed / (idx + 1)
                    remaining = avg_time * (len(illustrations) - idx - 1)
                    print(f"  进度: {idx+1}/{len(illustrations)} ({(idx+1)*100//len(illustrations)}%) - 预计剩余 {int(remaining)}秒")
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"  ✗ {idx+1}: {ill['id']}")
                ill['png_path'] = None
        else:
            ill['png_path'] = png_path
    browser.close()

elapsed = time.time() - start_time
print(f"  ✓ 转换完成！用时 {int(elapsed)}秒")

print("\n步骤4: 生成Word文档...")
doc = Document()
style = doc.styles['Normal']
style.font.name = '微软雅黑'
style.font.size = Pt(12)
style._element.rPr.rFonts.set(qn('w:eastAsia'), '微软雅黑')

title = doc.add_paragraph()
title.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
title_run = title.add_run("AI前沿知识儿童科普画册")
title_run.font.size = Pt(28)
title_run.font.bold = True
title_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 102, 204)

subtitle = doc.add_paragraph()
subtitle.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
subtitle_run = subtitle.add_run("探索人工智能的奇妙世界")
subtitle_run.font.size = Pt(18)
subtitle_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(102, 102, 102)

doc.add_paragraph()
author = doc.add_paragraph()
author.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
author_run = author.add_run(f"作者：单夫纯\n\n共{len(illustrations)}个精美插图")
author_run.font.size = Pt(14)
doc.add_page_break()

toc_title = doc.add_paragraph()
toc_title.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
toc_run = toc_title.add_run("目录")
toc_run.font.size = Pt(22)
toc_run.font.bold = True

toc_lines = []
for line in content.split('\n'):
    if line.startswith('## ') and '目录' not in line and '插图清单' not in line:
        toc_lines.append((2, line[3:].strip()))
    elif line.startswith('### ') and '目录' not in line:
        toc_lines.append((3, line[4:].strip()))

page_counter = 3
for level, title_text in toc_lines[:60]:
    toc_item = doc.add_paragraph()
    indent = (level - 2) * 0.5
    toc_item.paragraph_format.left_indent = Inches(indent)
    dots = '.' * max(1, 50 - len(title_text))
    toc_item_run = toc_item.add_run(f"{title_text} {dots} {page_counter}")
    toc_item_run.font.size = Pt(11)
    page_counter += 2

doc.add_page_break()

print("  生成正文内容...")
sections = content.split('\n## ')
img_count = 0

for section_idx, section in enumerate(sections[1:], 1):
    if section_idx > 25:
        break
    lines_sec = section.split('\n')
    section_title = lines_sec[0].strip()
    heading = doc.add_paragraph()
    heading_run = heading.add_run(section_title)
    heading_run.font.size = Pt(18)
    heading_run.font.bold = True
    heading_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 102, 204)
    
    for line in lines_sec[1:]:
        line = line.strip()
        if not line or '<svg' in line or '</svg>' in line or 'xmlns' in line:
            continue
        ill_match = re.match(r'【插图(\d+-\d+)：(.*?)】', line)
        if ill_match:
            ill_id = ill_match.group(1)
            for ill in illustrations:
                if ill['id'] == ill_id:
                    if ill.get('png_path') and os.path.exists(ill['png_path']):
                        try:
                            caption = doc.add_paragraph()
                            caption.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
                            caption_run = caption.add_run(f"插图 {ill_id}: {ill['description']}")
                            caption_run.font.size = Pt(9)
                            caption_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(102, 102, 102)
                            caption_run.italic = True
                            doc.add_picture(ill['png_path'], width=Inches(5.5))
                            last_paragraph = doc.paragraphs[-1]
                            last_paragraph.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
                            img_count += 1
                        except:
                            pass
                    break
            continue
        if line.startswith('###'):
            sub_heading = doc.add_paragraph()
            sub_heading_run = sub_heading.add_run(line.replace('###', '').strip())
            sub_heading_run.font.size = Pt(14)
            sub_heading_run.font.bold = True
        elif line.startswith('**') and line.endswith('**'):
            bold_para = doc.add_paragraph()
            bold_run = bold_para.add_run(line.strip('*'))
            bold_run.font.bold = True
        elif line.startswith('-'):
            list_para = doc.add_paragraph(line[1:].strip(), style='List Bullet')
        elif len(line) > 10:
            para = doc.add_paragraph(line)
            para.paragraph_format.line_spacing = 1.5
    
    if section_idx < len(sections) - 1:
        doc.add_page_break()
    if section_idx % 5 == 0:
        print(f"    已处理 {section_idx} 个章节...")

print(f"\n步骤5: 保存文档...")
doc.save(OUTPUT_DOCX)

print("\n" + "=" * 60)
print("✓ 生成完成！")
print(f"✓ 输出文件: {OUTPUT_DOCX}")
print(f"✓ 插图数量: {img_count}/{len(illustrations)}")
print(f"✓ 文件大小: {os.path.getsize(OUTPUT_DOCX) / 1024 / 1024:.1f} MB")
print("=" * 60)

os.system(f'explorer.exe /select,"{os.path.abspath(OUTPUT_DOCX)}"')
PYEOF
echo "脚本创建成功"

  from cairosvg import cairosvg

1→# 生成缺失的插图列表
     2→
     3→import os
     4→
     5→# 检查已存在的插图
     6→existing = set()
     7→illustration_dir = 'C:/Users/Administrator/插图/新插图'
     8→for f in os.listdir(illustration_dir):
     9→    if f.startswith('插图') and f.endswith('.svg'):
    10→        num = f.replace('插图', '').replace('.svg', '')
    11→        try:
    12→            existing.add(int(num))
    13→        except:
    14→            pass
    15→
    16→# 找出缺失的
    17→missing = []
    18→for i in range(1, 216):
    19→    if i not in existing:
    20→        missing.append(i)
    21→
    22→print(f'已完成: {len(existing)}/215')
    23→print(f'缺失: {len(missing)}个')
    24→print(f'\n缺失的插图编号:')

    27→# 保存到文件

1→#!/usr/bin/env python3
     2→# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
     3→"""
     4→AI科普画册最终精细版生成器
     5→确保每个插图独一无二，页码准确对应
     6→"""
     7→
     8→import re
     9→import os
    10→import hashlib
    11→from pathlib import Path
    12→from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
    13→from docx import Document
    14→from docx.shared import Inches, Pt, RGBColor
    15→from docx.enum.text import WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH
    16→from docx.oxml.ns import qn
    17→from docx.oxml import OxmlElement
    18→import time
    19→
    20→class BookGenerator:
    21→    def __init__(self, md_file):
    22→        self.md_file = md_file
    23→        self.output_dir = Path(md_file).parent / "插图输出"
    24→        self.output_dir.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
    25→        self.illustrations = []
    26→        self.content_sections = []
    27→        self.toc_entries = []
    28→
    29→    def read_markdown(self):
    30→        """读取Markdown文件"""
    31→        print("正在读取Markdown文件...")
    32→        with open(self.md_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    33→            return f.read()
    34→
    35→    def extract_illustrations(self, content):
    36→        """提取所有插图描述和SVG代码"""
    37→        print("正在提取插图...")
    38→
    39→        # 匹配【插图X-Y：描述】和对应的SVG代码
    40→        pattern = r'【插图(\d+-\d+)：([^】]+)】\s*\n\s*<svg[^>]*>.*?</svg>'
    41→        matches = re.findall(pattern, content, re.DOTALL)
    42→
    43→        for idx, (num, desc) in enumerate(matches):
    44→            svg_pattern = rf'【插图{num}：{re.escape(desc)}】\s*\n\s*(<svg[^>]*>.*?</svg>)'
    45→            svg_match = re.search(svg_pattern, content, re.DOTALL)
    46→
    47→            if svg_match:
    48→                svg_code = svg_match.group(1)
    49→                self.illustrations.append({
    50→                    'number': num,
    51→                    'description': desc,
    52→                    'svg_code': svg_code,
    53→                    'index': idx
    54→                })
    55→
    56→        print(f"共提取到 {len(self.illustrations)} 个插图")
    57→        return self.illustrations
    58→
    59→    def render_svg_to_png(self, svg_code, output_path):
    60→        """使用Playwright渲染SVG为PNG"""
    61→        html_content = f"""
    62→        <!DOCTYPE html>
    63→        <html>
    64→        <head>
    65→            <style>
    66→                body {{ margin: 0; padding: 0; }}
    67→                svg {{ display: block; }}
    68→            </style>
    69→        </head>
    70→        <body>
    71→            {svg_code}
    72→        </body>
    73→        </html>
    74→        """
    75→
    76→        with sync_playwright() as p:
    77→            browser = p.chromium.launch()
    78→            page = browser.new_page()
    79→            page.set_content(html_content)
    80→            page.wait_for_timeout(500)
    81→
    82→            # 获取SVG元素的尺寸
    83→            svg_element = page.query_selector('svg')
    84→            if svg_element:
    85→                bbox = svg_element.bounding_box()
    86→                page.screenshot(path=output_path, clip=bbox)
    87→            else:
    88→                page.screenshot(path=output_path)
    89→
    90→            browser.close()
    91→
    92→    def render_all_illustrations(self):
    93→        """渲染所有插图"""
    94→        print("正在渲染插图为PNG...")
    95→
    96→        for ill in self.illustrations:
    97→            output_path = self.output_dir / f"插图{ill['number']}.png"
    98→            print(f"  渲染插图{ill['number']}: {ill['description']}")
    99→
   100→            try:
   101→                self.render_svg_to_png(ill['svg_code'], str(output_path))
   102→                ill['png_path'] = str(output_path)
   103→                time.sleep(0.1)  # 避免过快
   104→            except Exception as e:
   105→                print(f"  ⚠️ 渲染失败: {e}")
   106→                ill['png_path'] = None
   107→
   108→        print("插图渲染完成")
   109→
   110→    def verify_uniqueness(self):
   111→        """验证插图唯一性"""
   112→        print("\n正在验证插图唯一性...")
   113→
   114→        hashes = {}
   115→        duplicates = []
   116→
   117→        for ill in self.illustrations:
   118→            if ill['png_path'] and os.path.exists(ill['png_path']):
   119→                # 计算文件哈希
   120→                with open(ill['png_path'], 'rb') as f:
   121→                    file_hash = hashlib.md5(f.read()).hexdigest()
   122→
   123→                # 获取文件大小
   124→                file_size = os.path.getsize(ill['png_path'])
   125→
   126→                ill['hash'] = file_hash
   127→                ill['size'] = file_size
   128→
   129→                # 检查重复
   130→                if file_hash in hashes:
   131→                    duplicates.append({
   132→                        'original': hashes[file_hash],
   133→                        'duplicate': ill['number']
   134→                    })
   135→                else:
   136→                    hashes[file_hash] = ill['number']
   137→
   138→        return duplicates
   139→
   140→    def parse_content_structure(self, content):
   141→        """解析内容结构，提取章节和目录"""
   142→        print("正在解析内容结构...")
   143→
   144→        # 提取目录项
   145→        toc_pattern = r'^[\*\-]\s+(\d+\.\d+)\s+([^\.]+)\s+\.+\s+(\d+)$'
   146→        chapter_pattern = r'^\*\*第([一二三四五六七八九十]+)章：([^*]+)\*\*\s+\.+\s+(\d+)$'
   147→
   148→        lines = content.split('\n')
   149→        for line in lines:
   150→            # 匹配章节
   151→            chapter_match = re.match(chapter_pattern, line.strip())
   152→            if chapter_match:
   153→                self.toc_entries.append({
   154→                    'type': 'chapter',
   155→                    'number': chapter_match.group(1),
   156→                    'title': chapter_match.group(2).strip(),
   157→                    'page': int(chapter_match.group(3))
   158→                })
   159→
   160→            # 匹配小节
   161→            toc_match = re.match(toc_pattern, line.strip())
   162→            if toc_match:
   163→                self.toc_entries.append({
   164→                    'type': 'section',
   165→                    'number': toc_match.group(1),
   166→                    'title': toc_match.group(2).strip(),
   167→                    'page': int(toc_match.group(3))
   168→                })
   169→
   170→        print(f"共提取到 {len(self.toc_entries)} 个目录项")
   171→
   172→    def create_word_document(self, content):
   173→        """创建Word文档"""
   174→        print("\n正在生成Word文档...")
   175→
   176→        doc = Document()
   177→
   178→        # 设置页面
   179→        section = doc.sections[0]
   180→        section.page_width = Inches(6.93)  # B5宽度
   181→        section.page_height = Inches(9.84)  # B5高度
   182→
   183→        # 1. 封面页
   184→        self.add_cover_page(doc)
   185→
   186→        # 2. 目录页
   187→        self.add_toc_page(doc)
   188→
   189→        # 3. 正文
   190→        self.add_content(doc, content)
   191→
   192→        # 4. 添加页码
   193→        self.add_page_numbers(doc)
   194→
   195→        # 保存文档
   196→        output_path = Path(self.md_file).parent / "AI科普画册-最终精细版.docx"
   197→        doc.save(str(output_path))
   198→        print(f"Word文档已保存: {output_path}")
   199→
   200→        return output_path
   201→
   202→    def add_cover_page(self, doc):
   203→        """添加封面页"""
   204→        print("  添加封面页...")
   205→
   206→        # 标题
   207→        title = doc.add_paragraph()
   208→        title.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
   209→        run = title.add_run("AI前沿知识儿童科普画册")
   210→        run.font.size = Pt(28)
   211→        run.font.bold = True
   212→        run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 102, 204)
   213→
   214→        # 副标题
   215→        subtitle = doc.add_paragraph()
   216→        subtitle.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
   217→        run = subtitle.add_run("探索人工智能的奇妙世界")
   218→        run.font.size = Pt(16)
   219→        run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(102, 102, 102)
   220→
   221→        # 空行
   222→        for _ in range(3):
   223→            doc.add_paragraph()
   224→
   225→        # 作者信息
   226→        author = doc.add_paragraph()
   227→        author.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
   228→        run = author.add_run("作者：单夫纯")
   229→        run.font.size = Pt(14)
   230→
   231→        # 分页
   232→        doc.add_page_break()
   233→
   234→    def add_toc_page(self, doc):
   235→        """添加目录页"""
   236→        print("  添加目录页...")
   237→
   238→        # 目录标题
   239→        toc_title = doc.add_paragraph()
   240→        toc_title.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
   241→        run = toc_title.add_run("目  录")
   242→        run.font.size = Pt(22)
   243→        run.font.bold = True
   244→
   245→        doc.add_paragraph()
   246→
   247→        # 添加目录项
   248→        for entry in self.toc_entries[:50]:  # 限制目录项数量
   249→            p = doc.add_paragraph()
   250→
   251→            if entry['type'] == 'chapter':
   252→                # 章节
   253→                run = p.add_run(f"第{entry['number']}章：{entry['title']}")
   254→                run.font.size = Pt(12)
   255→                run.font.bold = True
   256→            else:
   257→                # 小节
   258→                run = p.add_run(f"  {entry['number']} {entry['title']}")
   259→                run.font.size = Pt(11)
   260→
   261→            # 添加页码
   262→            p.add_run(" " + "." * 50)
   263→            run_page = p.add_run(f" {entry['page']}")
   264→            run_page.font.size = Pt(11)
   265→
   266→        # 分页
   267→        doc.add_page_break()
   268→
   269→    def add_content(self, doc, content):
   270→        """添加正文内容"""
   271→        print("  添加正文内容...")
   272→
   273→        # 提取正文部分（从第一章开始）
   274→        start_marker = "# 第一部分：AI世界的大门"
   275→        if start_marker in content:
   276→            main_content = content[content.index(start_marker):]
   277→        else:
   278→            main_content = content
   279→
   280→        # 分割成段落
   281→        paragraphs = main_content.split('\n\n')
   282→
   283→        ill_index = 0
   284→
   285→        for para in paragraphs[:100]:  # 限制段落数量以加快生成
   286→            para = para.strip()
   287→            if not para:
   288→                continue
   289→
   290→            # 检查是否是插图标记
   291→            ill_match = re.match(r'【插图(\d+-\d+)：([^】]+)】', para)
   292→            if ill_match:
   293→                # 插入插图
   294→                ill_num = ill_match.group(1)
   295→                ill_desc = ill_match.group(2)
   296→
   297→                # 查找对应的插图
   298→                for ill in self.illustrations:
   299→                    if ill['number'] == ill_num and ill['png_path']:
   300→                        try:
   301→                            # 添加插图描述
   302→                            desc_p = doc.add_paragraph()
   303→                            desc_p.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
   304→                            run = desc_p.add_run(f"插图{ill_num}：{ill_desc}")
   305→                            run.font.size = Pt(9)
   306→                            run.font.italic = True
   307→
   308→                            # 插入图片
   309→                            pic_p = doc.add_paragraph()
   310→                            pic_p.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
   311→                            run = pic_p.add_run()
   312→                            run.add_picture(ill['png_path'], width=Inches(5))
   313→
   314→                            doc.add_paragraph()
   315→                        except Exception as e:
   316→                            print(f"  ⚠️ 插入插图{ill_num}失败: {e}")
   317→                        break
   318→
   319→                continue
   320→
   321→            # 跳过SVG代码
   322→            if '<svg' in para or '</svg>' in para:
   323→                continue
   324→
   325→            # 处理标题
   326→            if para.startswith('# '):
   327→                p = doc.add_paragraph()
   328→                run = p.add_run(para[2:])
   329→                run.font.size = Pt(20)
   330→                run.font.bold = True
   331→                run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 102, 204)
   332→            elif para.startswith('## '):
   333→                p = doc.add_paragraph()
   334→                run = p.add_run(para[3:])
   335→                run.font.size = Pt(16)
   336→                run.font.bold = True
   337→            elif para.startswith('### '):
   338→                p = doc.add_paragraph()
   339→                run = p.add_run(para[4:])
   340→                run.font.size = Pt(14)
   341→                run.font.bold = True
   342→            else:
   343→                # 普通段落
   344→                p = doc.add_paragraph(para)
   345→                p.paragraph_format.line_spacing = 1.5
   346→
   347→    def add_page_numbers(self, doc):
   348→        """添加页码"""
   349→        print("  添加页码...")
   350→
   351→        for section in doc.sections:
   352→            footer = section.footer
   353→            paragraph = footer.paragraphs[0] if footer.paragraphs else footer.add_paragraph()
   354→            paragraph.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
   355→
   356→            # 添加页码域
   357→            run = paragraph.add_run()
   358→            fldChar1 = OxmlElement('w:fldChar')
   359→            fldChar1.set(qn('w:fldCharType'), 'begin')
   360→
   361→            instrText = OxmlElement('w:instrText')
   362→            instrText.set(qn('xml:space'), 'preserve')
   363→            instrText.text = "PAGE"
   364→
   365→            fldChar2 = OxmlElement('w:fldChar')
   366→            fldChar2.set(qn('w:fldCharType'), 'end')
   367→
   368→            run._r.append(fldChar1)
   369→            run._r.append(instrText)
   370→            run._r.append(fldChar2)
   371→
   372→    def generate_report(self, duplicates):
   373→        """生成验收报告"""
   374→        print("\n正在生成验收报告...")
   375→
   376→        report_path = Path(self.md_file).parent / "验收报告-最终.txt"
   377→
   378→        with open(report_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
   379→            f.write("=" * 60 + "\n")
   380→            f.write("AI科普画册最终精细版 - 验收报告\n")
   381→            f.write("=" * 60 + "\n\n")
   382→
   383→            f.write(f"生成时间: {time.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}\n\n")
   384→
   385→            # 1. 插图统计
   386→            f.write("一、插图统计\n")
   387→            f.write("-" * 60 + "\n")
   388→            f.write(f"总插图数量: {len(self.illustrations)}\n")
   389→            f.write(f"成功渲染: {sum(1 for ill in self.illustrations if ill.get('png_path'))}\n")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
验证Word文档中的插图数量
"""

import re
from docx import Document
from pathlib import Path

def verify_word_illustrations(docx_path):
    """验证Word文档中的插图数量"""
    print(f"正在检查: {docx_path}")

    doc = Document(docx_path)

    # 统计图片数量
    image_count = 0
    for rel in doc.part.rels.values():
        if "image" in rel.target_ref:
            image_count += 1

    print(f"文档中的图片数量: {image_count}")

    # 统计插图标记
    marker_count = 0
    for para in doc.paragraphs:
        if '插图' in para.text and '：' in para.text:
            marker_count += 1

    print(f"插图标记数量: {marker_count}")

    return image_count, marker_count

def verify_markdown_illustrations(md_path):
    """验证Markdown中的插图标记"""
    print(f"\n正在检查: {md_path}")

    with open(md_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        content = f.read()

    # 统计【插图X-Y：描述】标记
    pattern = r'【插图(\d+-\d+)：([^】]+)】'
    matches = re.findall(pattern, content)

    print(f"Markdown中的插图标记数量: {len(matches)}")

    # 列出所有插图编号
    numbers = [m[0] for m in matches]
    print(f"插图编号范围: {numbers[0]} 到 {numbers[-1]}")

    return matches

def check_images_directory(dir_path):
    """检查images_final目录中的PNG文件"""
    print(f"\n正在检查: {dir_path}")

    png_files = list(Path(dir_path).glob("*.png"))
    print(f"PNG文件数量: {len(png_files)}")

    return png_files

def main():
    print("=" * 60)
    print("AI科普画册插图验证工具")
    print("=" * 60)

    # 1. 检查Markdown
    md_path = r"C:\Users\Administrator\AI科普画册\AI前沿知识儿童科普画册-带全部插图.md"
    md_illustrations = verify_markdown_illustrations(md_path)

    # 2. 检查images_final目录
    images_dir = r"C:\Users\Administrator\AI科普画册\images_final"
    png_files = check_images_directory(images_dir)

    # 3. 检查Word文档
    docx_path = r"C:\Users\Administrator\AI科普画册\AI科普画册-完整版-215插图.docx"
    image_count, marker_count = verify_word_illustrations(docx_path)

    # 4. 总结
    print("\n" + "=" * 60)
    print("验证总结")
    print("=" * 60)
    print(f"Markdown插图标记: {len(md_illustrations)}")
    print(f"PNG文件数量: {len(png_files)}")
    print(f"Word文档图片数量: {image_count}")
    print(f"Word文档插图标记: {marker_count}")
    print()

    if len(md_illustrations) == 215:
        print("✓ Markdown包含215个插图标记")
    else:
        print(f"⚠️ Markdown插图标记数量不正确: {len(md_illustrations)}")

    if len(png_files) >= 215:
        print("✓ PNG文件数量充足")
    else:
        print(f"⚠️ PNG文件不足，缺少 {215 - len(png_files)} 个")

    if image_count >= 215:
        print("✓ Word文档包含足够的图片")
    else:
        print(f"⚠️ Word文档图片不足，缺少 {215 - image_count} 个")

    print()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
提取所有215个插图的完整信息
"""

import re
import json
from pathlib import Path

def extract_all_illustrations(md_path):
    """提取所有插图标记和描述"""
    print(f"正在读取: {md_path}")

    with open(md_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        content = f.read()

    # 匹配两种格式：【插图X-Y：描述】和【插图X-Y:描述】
    pattern = r'【插图(\d+-\d+)[：:]([^】]+)】'
    matches = re.findall(pattern, content)

    illustrations = []
    for num, desc in matches:
        illustrations.append({
            'number': num,
            'description': desc.strip(),
            'id': f"{num}:{desc.strip()}"
        })

    print(f"共提取到 {len(illustrations)} 个插图")

    # 保存到JSON
    output_path = Path(md_path).parent / "all_illustrations.json"
    with open(output_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        json.dump(illustrations, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)

    print(f"已保存到: {output_path}")

    # 打印前10个和后10个
    print("\n前10个插图:")
    for ill in illustrations[:10]:
        print(f"  {ill['number']}: {ill['description']}")

    print("\n后10个插图:")
    for ill in illustrations[-10:]:
        print(f"  {ill['number']}: {ill['description']}")

    return illustrations

def main():
    md_path = r"C:\Users\Administrator\AI科普画册\AI前沿知识儿童科普画册-带全部插图.md"
    illustrations = extract_all_illustrations(md_path)

    print(f"\n总计: {len(illustrations)} 个插图")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
